query: SELECT id, claim_id, estimated_cost, estimated_parts_cost, estimated_labor_cost, confidence_score, fraud_risk_level, structural_damage_severity, model_version, processing_time, damage_description, currency_code, pipeline_run_summary FROM ai_assessments WHERE claim_id = 2130345 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zQEb4HwERZa3vD.6f0bc5e32ffe --database YbS42LwGroxbVepAMjk4bS --execute SELECT id, claim_id, estimated_cost, estimated_parts_cost, estimated_labor_cost, confidence_score, fraud_risk_level, structural_damage_severity, model_version, processing_time, damage_description, currency_code, pipeline_run_summary FROM ai_assessments WHERE claim_id = 2130345 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

rows.damage_description: TOYOTA FORTUNER (2016). Insured vehicle went into the rear of a Honda fit and sustained damages on the front bumper, grill and nudge bar. Vehicle has pre-accident damages on the windscreen.. 4 damaged components identified.
